description: QuadStream is a governance and treasury tool that replaces lump-sum grants with streaming quadratic funding. Traditional QF is vulnerable to sybil attacks and 'grant-and-ghost' behavior. QuadStream uses a dynamic matching pool that adjusts streaming rates to recipients based on the square of the sum of square roots of individual contributor stream magnitudes. Tech stack: Solidity (Hardhat), Ethers.js, and a vanilla JS dashboard. It features a 'StreamGovernor' that manages a matching treasury, a
angle: Combines Quadratic Funding with Superfluid-style payment streams to prevent 'hit-and-run' grant draining and ensure continuous contributor alignment.
